Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT up.upgrade, count(*) AS change 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS up JOIN resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs.upgrade = 0 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND up.applicability = true AND up.upgrade != 0 AND (up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" IS NULL OR bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" IS NULL) AND (up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" IS NULL OR bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" IS NULL) AND (up."out.fuel_oil.total.energy_consumption" IS NULL OR bs."out.fuel_oil.total.energy_consumption" IS NULL) AND (up."out.propane.total.energy_consumption" IS NULL OR bs."out.propane.total.energy_consumption" IS NULL) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/98fc2bd71874f6e7eb190f90ee0c8538862daf48c3a295fab3879fcd6f715ddb/c25ca115-4eb2-4b0e-95d5-9bd244cc3c7a/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
